title: Gica’s Dance - Reworked By The Nicola Conte Jazz Combo – Gerardo Frisina
comment:
涼やかなビブラフォンと共にホーンと鍵盤が静かにかつ熱く踊り出す。
クラブジャズグルーヴをより高揚感のある質感へ磨き上げた一曲。

Alongside the cool shimmer of vibraphone, horns and keys begin to dance with quiet intensity.
A track that polishes its club jazz groove into a more uplifting form.
